error_signature: space is not generated when using a formula
title: Space not generated in data grid with formula
symptom: When using the 'Custom' option in the data grid component with a formula, the expected interactive space is not generated. This leads to a lack of interactivity in the grid cells.
applies_when: Using the 'Custom' option in the data grid
Passing an array through a formula
not_this_if: Using other cell types like 'text' or 'number'
root_cause: The issue arises because the data grid component does not properly handle the rendering of custom cells when the data is passed through a formula. This can lead to the absence of the expected interactive space that should be generated for custom cells.
fix_steps: Check the formula used to pass the array to ensure it is correctly structured.
If necessary, modify the formula to ensure it returns the expected data format.
Test the grid again to see if the interactive space is generated.
agent_instruction: Verify and adjust the formula used for the custom cell data in the data grid component.
